plugin_desc: 神州数码（DCN）交换机专用 SNMP 采集（DCN-MIB，IANA 私有企业号 6339）。在标准 IF-MIB 接口指标之外，额外采集 DCN 私有 OID 的设备健康指标：CPU 利用率（switchCpuUsage，直接百分比）与系统内存（switchMemorySize 总量 / switchMemoryBusy 已用，单位为字节）。内存利用率按 已用/总量 计算。DCN-MIB 的 switchInfo 系统表仅提供 CPU 与内存标量，不暴露温度/风扇/电源传感器，故这些维度不采集（N/A）。适用品牌型号——神州数码 DCN DCS/DCRS/CS 系列园区交换机。
name: Switch

metrics.name: device_cpu_usage
metrics.description: This metric reports the CPU utilization of the DCN switch control plane (DCN-MIB switchCpuUsage, a direct percent value), normalized to 0-100. Sustained high CPU usage can indicate control-plane overload, routing instability, or attack traffic, and may lead to slow management response or packet processing delays.

metrics.name: device_memory_total
metrics.description: This metric reports the total size in bytes of the DCN switch system memory (DCN-MIB switchMemorySize, reported directly in bytes). Together with the used bytes it determines overall memory utilization.

metrics.name: device_memory_used
metrics.description: This metric reports the number of bytes currently in use by the DCN switch system memory (DCN-MIB switchMemoryBusy, reported directly in bytes). It helps administrators understand absolute memory consumption and identify when the device is under memory pressure.

metrics.name: device_memory_usage
metrics.description: This metric reports overall memory utilization of the DCN switch, computed as used / total * 100. High memory usage may indicate memory leaks, oversized routing/MAC/ARP tables, or insufficient capacity, and can cause instability or failed allocations.

metrics.name: interface_ifHCInOctets
metrics.description: This metric indicates the average rate of bytes received over the past 5 minutes, measured in bytes per second, from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCInOctets counter (ifXTable). The 64-bit counter avoids the rapid wrap of the 32-bit ifInOctets on high-speed switch ports, keeping the rate accurate.

metrics.name: interface_ifHCOutOctets
metrics.description: This metric calculates the average rate of bytes sent over the past 5 minutes, measured in bytes per second, from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCOutOctets counter (ifXTable). The 64-bit counter avoids the rapid wrap of the 32-bit ifOutOctets on high-speed switch ports, keeping the rate accurate.

metrics.name: snmp_uptime
metrics.description: This metric indicates the uptime of the device since the last restart. By monitoring the uptime, network administrators can understand the stability and reliability of the device and identify potential reboot or failure issues.
